BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Apex classes are invoked via web/API flows within Salesforce.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: Once a vulnerable class/method is reachable, no complex setup is required.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: Requires an authenticated user able to reach the code path.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: Does not require social engineering or user clicks beyond normal access.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Operates within the same org boundary.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Without sharing, code may access records the user should not see.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: May enable limited unauthorized changes via DML depending on logic.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Often demonstrated during security testing by invoking methods under low-priv users.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Add 'with sharing' or 'inherited sharing' and review access patterns.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: Rule maps to established access-control weaknesses.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Apex classes are invoked via web/API flows within Salesforce.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Once a vulnerable class/method is reachable, no complex setup is required.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Requires an authenticated user able to reach the code path.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Does not require social engineering or user clicks beyond normal access.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Operates within the same org boundary.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Without sharing, code may access records the user should not see.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: May enable limited unauthorized changes via DML depending on logic.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Record visibility is critical for compliance/privacy.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity matters but typically less than confidentiality for sharing issues.
